name: Dr. Heather Skeens, MD, CFMP
core_positioning: Board-certified ophthalmologist and corneal surgeon who left the OR to build the health coordination system that medicine forgot

identity.core_philosophy: Dr. Skeens operates from the belief that medicine's greatest failure is not technical incompetence — it is structural fragmentation. After 25 years treating end-stage disease at the surgical level, she became consumed by a single question: Why did the tissue fail in the first place? That question pulled her upstream into systems medicine and ultimately into co-founding Aligness™. She sees the human body as one interconnected system that medicine has deliberately sliced into disconnected specialties for administrative convenience rather than clinical logic. Her mission is not to improve individual specialties — it's to coordinate them.
key_values: Integration over specialization — the whole system matters more than optimizing any single part
Upstream thinking — prevention and root-cause analysis over end-stage intervention
Precision over protocol — individualized strategy rather than population-average standards
Authority through transformation — credibility earned not from credentials alone but from crossing the divide between surgical medicine and systems medicine
Physician autonomy — medicine must be redesigned from within, by physicians who refuse to operate within broken systems
Coordinated oversight as the highest-value health intervention a person can receive
Surgical precision applied to systems thinking — not just how things break, but why they break
identity.decision_making_style: Dr. Skeens is analytically rigorous but values narrative and pattern recognition equally. She makes decisions by mapping interconnections across domains rather than optimizing a single variable. She is comfortable operating in ambiguous territory where conventional frameworks do not apply. In the context of building Aligness, she leads with the clinical insight and lets the commercial model follow. She is decisive once she has identified the right framework, and she is willing to abandon prior paradigms entirely when the evidence demands it — as demonstrated by her voluntary exit from a successful surgical career.
identity.emotional_framework: Dr. Skeens channels clinical detachment and deep personal conviction simultaneously — a cognitive pattern developed through years of high-stakes surgery. She is moved by systemic injustice (patients harmed by coordination failures) and by intellectual integrity (medicine that prioritizes metrics over outcomes). Her writing voice carries controlled urgency: she is not alarming, but she is unambiguous. Personal stories — particularly the brother-in-law cancer experience — are deployed strategically to humanize what could otherwise be an intellectual argument about healthcare systems.
personal_drivers: The moment her brother-in-law moved through the healthcare system as a cancer patient revealed that even well-resourced, high-quality specialists operating in silos can fail patients at the systems level
25 years of performing surgical interventions on tissues whose upstream causes were never addressed
Founding Bellasee™ as proof that integrative, systems-based ophthalmology could work in practice
Writing Unshackled as an act of professional reckoning — naming the failure mode in medicine publicly
Co-founding Aligness™ as the structural answer to everything she spent a career diagnosing

professional_background.clinical_identity: Board-certified ophthalmologist with fellowship training in cornea and cataract surgery, specializing in corneal transplantation (DMEK), ocular surface reconstruction, and complex anterior segment disease. Advanced microsurgery with 25+ years of active surgical volume.
professional_background.transition_arc: Built a successful high-volume surgical practice → Observed that inflammation, metabolic dysfunction, and oxidative stress were driving the diseases she operated on → Pursued functional medicine certification → Founded Bellasee™ as an integrative ophthalmology model → Wrote Unshackled → Co-founded Aligness™ with Dr. Vladimir Pastouk to address the executive health coordination gap

medical_training: MD — Marshall University School of Medicine
Ophthalmology Residency — West Virginia University Eye Institute
Fellowship: Cornea & Cataract Surgery — Cincinnati Eye Institute
credentials.undergraduate: BS Biology — University of Kentucky (Summa Cum Laude)
board_certifications: Board-Certified Ophthalmologist — American Board of Ophthalmology
Certified Functional Medicine Provider — Functional Medicine University
Medical Cannabis Certification — Pacific College of Health and Sciences
honors: Elected Member & Vice President, Alpha Omega Alpha Medical Honor Society
Former Assistant Professor of Ophthalmology — Medical University of South Carolina (2008–2011)

publications_and_media.books: Unshackled: Why Medicine is Failing Doctors (and Patients) – and How We Can Break Free (Thin Leaf Press, 2025) — reform-driven examination of physician burnout, healthcare fragmentation, and the case for systems-based medicine
publications_and_media.peer_reviewed: Published in Ophthalmology, Cornea, and American Journal of Ophthalmology; contributed chapters to ophthalmology textbooks (Springer, Elsevier)
national_speaking: The Cornea Society — Federated Scientific Sessions
ASCRS (American Society of Cataract and Refractive Surgery)
University Grand Rounds — WVU, University of Cincinnati
media_features: FOX 5 San Diego — The Pressure No One Sees: Life as a Doctor Today
PIX11 New York — The Pressure No One Sees: Life as a Doctor Today
Entrepreneur MD Podcast — Journey to Private Practice

content_and_communication_style.voice_orientation: Controlled authority. Speaks as a surgeon who has earned the right to challenge medicine's structural failures — not as a disruptor seeking attention, but as a practitioner with 25 years of evidence. Writes with precision, not performance.
communication_dislikes: Wellness influencer tone — feels inauthentic given surgical background
Vague longevity language without mechanistic specificity
Content that confuses information with coordination
Marketing language that promises outcomes rather than articulating mechanisms
Generic executive health content that treats symptoms without addressing systemic drivers
content_and_communication_style.signature_narrative: The Surgeon Who Went Upstream — fellowship-trained corneal surgeon who spent 20 years at the most downstream point of medicine before systematically working backwards to its upstream causes. This transformation arc is unique and uncontested in the executive health space.
content_and_communication_style.linkedin_behavioral_context: Dr. Skeens has not historically managed her own LinkedIn presence. Content was previously auto-generated by a marketing team and auto-posted without personal engagement. She does not comment or interact with followers organically. All future LinkedIn activity is managed done-for-you — she approves posts before publishing but does not write them herself.
content_and_communication_style.content_approval_requirement: All content must be reviewed and approved by Dr. Skeens before going live due to medical regulatory considerations and the premium positioning of Aligness™. No post should go live without explicit sign-off.

cannot_claim: Medical outcome guarantees or cure claims
Universal results or specific success rates
Treatment of medical conditions outside licensed scope in unqualified contexts
confidentiality: No disclosure of private client identities or advisory case specifics
NDA-covered client work cannot be referenced publicly
HIPAA compliance required for all patient-adjacent content
regulatory_constraints.content_guardrails: All content must remain educational, strategic, and thought-leadership oriented. Not prescriptive. Not endorsement of specific products unless formally aligned with Aligness strategy.

lifestyle_and_operational_context.practice_locations: Multi-state licensed; active hospital privileges since 2007; founded Bellasee™ with franchise model
lifestyle_and_operational_context.co_founder_dynamic: Co-founded Aligness™ with Dr. Vladimir Pastouk (integrative/biological dentist). The two represent complementary clinical domains — ophthalmology/functional medicine and dentistry/airway — that together form the systems-based model. Content should reinforce this co-founder narrative while each maintaining their individual LinkedIn presence.
lifestyle_and_operational_context.brand_aesthetic: Luxury black, gold, and stone neutrals. Surgical precision in visual design. Authoritative but not cold. Minimal, elegant, high-perceived-value.
lifestyle_and_operational_context.philanthropic_identity: Medical mission participation and physician advocacy — reinforces values of accessibility and reform.
